problem.title: CT-LIO trade-off on the public ROS1 HDL-400 window with synthesized per-point time
problem.question: Which CT-LIO profile should stay as the current default when the public ROS1 HDL-400 bag is reconstructed with scan-order synthetic point timestamps?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv
dataset.timestamp_note: The public ROS1 bag lacks a native time field, so per-point time is synthesized from scan order.

variants.label: IMU preintegration default
variants.intent: Baseline CT-LIO profile with IMU bias estimation and a short fixed-lag prior.

variants.label: Seed-only fast
variants.intent: Keep the IMU seed but avoid the heavier lag smoother path.

variants.label: History smoother dense
variants.intent: Use a slightly longer lag window and one extra relinearization pass for stronger motion regularization without the unbounded smoother cost.
